case_title: CONNIE CHAN VS. WEST COAST CLEARANCE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY CHAN, CONNIE AS TO DEFENDANT WEST COAST CLEARANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2012 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($65.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED APR-25-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WEST COAST CLEARANCE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. "DEFENDANT'S CHALLENGE TO VENUE IS GRANTED", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CHALLENGE OF VENUE RECEIVED FROM DEFENDANT
